chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 55 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.280/2022 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on CMA No.281/2022 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 23.11.2022 None present for the petitioner. It appears that instant petition was filed on 21.01.2022 and the office has raised certain objections, which have not yet been complied with. Even otherwise, the petitioner has filed this petition seeking directions to respondents to remove detection bill of electricity. The appropriate efficacious remedy is available to the petitioner before the Electric Inspector under the Electricity Act; hence, this petition being not maintainable is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
